assessment_objectives.objective: contracts with third-parties contractually impose safeguards (e.g., additional controls, access modification, contract termination, etc.) from Foreign Ownership, Control or Influence (FOCI) concerns to ensure that unauthorized access to sensitive and/or regulated data is prevented.

contracts with third-parties contractually impose safeguards (e.g., additional controls, access modification, contract termination, etc.) from FOCI concerns to ensure that performance of contracts is not adversely affected.
